description_long: This object consists of two hardcover books stacked neatly and secured together with a wide, light tan strap. The top book has a dark blue cover with gold corner protectors and visible gold text on the front, while the bottom book features a deep red cover with similar gold corner accents. The pages are tightly bound and the edges are clean, with the strap running vertically across both books, holding them firmly in place. The spines of both books display gold text, and the covers have a matte finish with no visible illustrations. The books appear well-kept and are likely intended for reading or carrying as a bundle.
description: A pair of hardcover books, one blue and one red, stacked and bound together with a tan strap. Both books have gold corner accents and visible gold text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked books with the tan strap running horizontally and the gold text on the top book's cover partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spines of both books, with gold text and the strap running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the clean page edges and the strap, with the gold corner protectors visible on both books.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the page edges and the strap, with the gold corner accents and the matte finish of the covers.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are colored to match the covers (blue and red) with gold text running horizontally. There are no decorative patterns, only simple gold corner accents.
